 We believe that your background probably entails 5+ years of experience and expertise within the Microsoft public cloud, such as M365 Security, Intune and Entra ID, including troubleshooting, deploying, and configuring of said solutions. It's likely that you also have experience with hybrid environments, Conditional Access, and Azure Security.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Strong Experience of M365 Security platform
* Strong Experience of Entra ID
* Genuine interest of helping customers within Cybersecurity
* Ability to prioritize and create implementation plans for Customers


**Bonus Skills:**
* Experience within Client Management
* Understanding of M365 licensing
* Ability to script and automate
* Experience with hybrid environments


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Customer Service Executive
description:
**Location** 
 : This is a hybrid role, offering a combination of being able to work remotely and from our Kista office.
 



**Contract Type** 
 : Full-time, permanent role
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 In this role, you will play a key part in creating an exceptional customer experience, with the customer truly at the heart of everything we do. You will deliver high‑quality service across our communication channels and become a trusted point of contact, helping ensure that customers choose RS time and time again.
 



 As the first line of support, you will quickly assess each situation and guide customers to the right department, ensuring they receive the most effective and efficient service possible. Your ability to understand customer needs, offer the right assistance, and maintain a positive, solution‑focused approach will make you an essential contributor to our service excellence.
 



  





**What You Will Be Doing** 



* Handle customer inquiries across phone, email and chat, providing accurate information and resolving issues efficiently.
* Ensure a positive customer experience by listening to needs, offering solutions, and escalating complex cases to the right teams when needed.
* Support customers with technical questions, returns, complaints, order issues and delivery challenges.
* Maintain strong knowledge of our products, services and internal processes to deliver confident, high-quality support.
* Process customer orders correctly and manage your own customer portfolio to ensure consistent service.
* Handle customer data securely and in line with GDPR and company policies.
* Identify relevant sales opportunities during interactions and collaborate with the sales team on promising leads.



  





**What You’ll Bring** 



* Excellent communication skills in Swedish and English.
* A passion for delivering exceptional customer service and creating positive customer experiences.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to manage multiple channels (phone, email, chat).
* A detail‑oriented mindset with the ability to quickly understand customer needs and internal processes.
* The ability to handle difficult customer situations with patience, professionalism, and a solution‑oriented attitude.
* A collaborative approach – sharing knowledge, working well with colleagues and partnering with other departments.
* Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, engineering, or a related field.



  





**We Are RS** 




 We’ve been solving industry problems for over 80 years. We turn the ‘what ifs’ into the ‘why nots’, the impossible into the possible.
 



 Our purpose? Making amazing happen for a better world.
 



 We offer service and product solutions to over 1.2 million customers globally, shipping a parcel every 2 seconds to over 130 countries. With over 800,000 stocked and 3 million unstocked products, we’re a trusted partner to the world’s leading industries.
 



 We’re looking for curious, driven, and empathetic professionals to join our journey. People who think differently, act with purpose, and want to make a real impact.
 



  





**Rewards** 




 Our Reward Strategy Philosophy is designed to offer market competitive base salaries and provide all of our people the opportunity to participate in a short-term incentive, enabling them to share in the success of the Company.
 



 Our total reward package is more than just the cash; our recognition and benefit offering provide the opportunity for us to recognise, reward and enable the wellbeing of our people at all stages of their journey with RS. Our rewards and benefits in Sweden include:
 


* Financial – pension scheme
* Wellbeing – insurances
* Lifestyle – sport benefit
* Spotlight – our global recognition programme provides a platform to highlight and recognise people role modelling our values



  





**Ready to Make Amazing Happen?** 




 Join c. 9,000 colleagues and help us shape the future of our industry. Whoever you are, wherever you are – it all starts here.
 



  





 Apply now and make RS a part of your journey.

title: Data Platform Engineer
description:
Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now, we are doing it again, building the next generation of banking in the cloud. We believe our success is rooted in our ability to leverage data and AI at scale, but more importantly, in the people who build it.

**The role**


As a Data Platform Engineer at Nordnet, you are shaping the foundation for how our entire organization leverages data. You’ll sit at the intersection of platform engineering, modern developer experience, and building a truly self-serve data ecosystem.


While we build great cloud-native solutions and scalable infrastructure, how we work is just as important as what we build. We have embraced agentic coding in our daily workflows and are excited about the impact it has. We believe that the best technical solutions come from collaboration, and lean into pair and mob programming. You won't be an island here; you’ll have a team that has your back.

**What we do together**


You'll join a collaborative community of data engineers, analysts, and scientists. While you will have your dedicated specialist team, you are also part of a larger group where we share knowledge, help and grow together. We value a curious, humble, and thoughtful approach that supports our ability to build great products.


In our daily work, we focus on

* Cloud Infrastructure: Design and improve our Self-Serve Data Platform on GCP using modern Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Platform Engineering Practices: Build the tools, standards, and automation that empower other teams across Nordnet to easily create, secure, and share high-quality data products.
* Agentic Engineering: Leverage agentic coding tools as a natural part of our daily work to solve coding tasks, automate repetitive platform work, and accelerate our learning.

**Who you are**


We think you’ll fit right in if you value solving problems through discussion and thrive in an environment of shared learning and collaboration. We think that you

* Have 3+ years of professional experience within data engineering.
* Understand Python and SQL well, and you enjoy writing and quality-checking code to build a great platform.
* Have a foundational understanding of Infrastructure as Code, specifically Terraform.
* Are excited about modern development and are curious about agentic coding as a tool to solve problems, automate tasks, and learn faster.
* Take ownership in the quality of your work and for the team’s collective success.

**Skills you have or will grow with us**

* Architecting enterprise-scale cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Advanced DevOps practices and building automated CI/CD pipelines.
* Modern distributed data architecture, working closely with tools and services like dbt and BigQuery.

**What we offer**


Ever since we started in 1996, our purpose has been to democratize savings and investments. We have 2.4 million customers spread across the four Nordic countries, and are the number one pan-nordic digital platform for savings and investments.


As an employee at Nordnet, we are committed to your continuous growth, offering a space where you can learn, contribute, and take ownership of your technical domain. We offer:

* A hybrid work model that gives you focused flexibility at home and creative collaboration in the office.
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution (friskvårdsbidrag) and access to health resources.
* A robust package including collective agreements (kollektivavtal), occupational pension (BTP), and comprehensive insurance.
* The opportunity to create real impact and see how your work influences how your colleagues work, and the success of Nordnet.

**Application**


We know that the best products are built by teams with a mix of different backgrounds and perspectives. If you are excited about the challenges we’re solving and see yourself contributing to our team culture, we’d love to hear from you.


To ensure a fair and streamlined process for everyone, we only accept applications through our recruitment system. We interview continuously, so feel free to reach out as soon as possible!


Please note: Nordnet conducts credit and background checks on the final candidate as part of our standard process for a digital bank.


We look forward to meeting you!

title: Senior Software Engineering (Robotics)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Software Configuration Management (CM) & DevOps Engineer to join a highly experienced system team responsible for controller software development and integration.


In this role, you will work with software system integration, product packaging, build management, and common development infrastructure supporting a large software organisation. The environment is based on Visual Studio and Azure DevOps, utilising technologies and practices such as build pipelines, Git branching strategies, MSBuild, and automated testing frameworks.


You will collaborate closely with software architects, process owners, program managers, and release managers, contributing to both agile software development and cross-functional product release projects.


The ideal candidate is a hands-on and pragmatic developer with a structured mindset, strong technical expertise, and a passion for creating efficient, reliable, and well-organised development environments.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Support and develop software configuration management and DevOps practices.
* Work with software system integration, product packaging, and build processes.
* Maintain and improve development infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines.
* Collaborate with software architects, release managers, and development teams.
* Support agile development and product release activities across multiple domains.
* Drive improvements in automation, quality, and development efficiency.
* Ensure structured and sustainable ways of working within the development environment

**Requirements**

* Strong experience in Software Configuration Management (CM) and DevOps engineering.
* Experience working in Visual Studio and Azure DevOps environments.
* Hands-on knowledge of building pipelines, Git branching strategies, MSBuild, and automated testing frameworks such as Google Test.
* Experience with software system integration and release management.
* Understanding of agile development methodologies, preferably SAFe.
* Structured, analytical, and detail-oriented approach to problem-solving.
* Strong collaboration and communication skills.
* Fluent in English, both written and spoken.


This is an exciting opportunity to join a highly skilled team working at the core of a complex software platform, contributing to both development excellence and successful product releases.


This is a full-time consultant position in Västerås through Incluso. Start is July 2026. It´s a **one-year** limited contract, with the possibility of extension. This role is 100% onsite.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible. We will review the applications on an ongoing basis.


For more information about this role, please contact Karin Persson.

title: Scrum Master
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt och metoder
* Certifierad Scrum Master
* Certifierad Prosci Change Manager eller motsvarande erfarenhet av förändringsledning
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av Agile Coaching och agila transformationsresor
* Erfarenhet av organisationsförändring och kulturutveckling
* Erfarenhet av DevOps och moderna utvecklingsmiljöer
* Stark förmåga att facilitera, coacha och påverka organisationer
* God erfarenhet av stakeholder management och förändringsarbete
* Flytande engelska i tal och skrift

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 12-06-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Applications Operations Engineer
description:
***På Prevas tror vi på att teknik gör världen bättre. Och för att lyckas göra den bättre, behöver vi personer som dig. Vi kommer att ge dig ansvar och har full tilltro till att du som expert inom området har de bästa lösningarna. Vi har nämligen en stark tro på människan och är övertygade om att din utveckling är vår utveckling. Vi vet också att vår gemensamma kompetens blir starkare när vi hjälper varandra och bryr oss. Därför bygger vår kultur på just det, att finnas där för varandra och ha kul längs vägen.***

 **Hello Opportunity!**  

Som Application Operations Engineer blir du en nyckelspelare i vårt team för drift och support. Här arbetar du med drift, övervakning och kontinuerlig förbättring av applikationer och plattformar – både i molnbaserade och lokala miljöer. Rollen är bred och kombinerar operativt arbete med automation och DevOps. Du arbetar nära våra interna utvecklingsteam samt våra kunders support- och IT-organisationer. Tillsammans med övriga kollegor i teamet arbetar du proaktivt med stabilitet, tillgänglighet, säkerhet och kostnadseffektiv drift samtidigt som vi stöttar våra kunder i deras dagliga arbete.


Vi erbjuder dig en trygg och förmånlig anställning med stora utvecklingsmöjligheter. Trivs du på en arbetsplats där du får utbyta erfarenheter med duktiga kollegor och samtidigt ha roligt på jobbet? Då är Prevas i Karlstad rätt för dig.

**Hello You!**  

Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet inom Application Operations eller IT-drift och trivs att arbeta i komplexa miljöer. Du har god felsökningsförmåga och är van att arbeta strukturerat och lösningsorienterat.


Vi tror att du har:

* Erfarenhet av övervakning och incidenthantering
* Kunskap om containerplattformar och automation
* Vana att arbeta i både moln- och on-prem-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av scripting
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska samt god kommunikativ förmåga
* Trivs bra med både teamwork och att driva eget arbete framåt

Meriterande:

* Erfarenhet av DevOps-arbete
* Erfarenhet av kostnadsoptimering i molntjänster
* Erfarenhet från säkerhetskritiska miljöer
* Intresse för AI och hur det kan användas inom drift och operations

För att trivas hos oss på Prevas är det viktigt att du har ett stort engagemang och driv. Du är en nyfiken och ansvarstagande person som trivs både i team och i självständigt arbete. Du har ett genuint intresse för IT-drift och moderna arbetssätt. Utöver det är du analytisk och strukturerad med en förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i problem och hitta hållbara lösningar. Dina kunskaper är viktiga för oss men vi värdesätter lika mycket dina personliga egenskaper.

**Hello Team Player!**  

För oss är gemenskap och delaktighet viktigt där alla bidrar med sin kunskap i en lärande miljö. Här får du arbeta i en platt nätverksbaserad organisation med goda möjligheter att påverka utformningen av vår verksamhet. Gemensamt för oss som arbetar på Prevas är ett stort teknikintresse, arbetsglädje och kundnytta i fokus. På kontoret i Karlstad är vi en härlig mix av kvinnor och män i olika åldrar som uppmuntrar varandra att utvecklas. Tillsammans gör vi Prevas till något unikt som vi kan vara stolta över.


**Hello Next Step!**  

Välkommen med din ansökan så snart som möjligt, vi rekryterar löpande! Hör gärna av dig om du har funderingar kring tjänsten: emmelie.dahlin@prevas.se  

  



Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser

title: AI Engineer (Cloud & Backend)
description:
På Knowit Core i Malmö kombinerar vi modern systemutveckling med den senaste AI-tekniken för att skapa smarta, skalbara lösningar som ger konkret affärsvärde för våra kunder.


Nu söker vi en AI Engineer som vill vara med och bygga nästa generation backend- och cloudlösningar tillsammans med utvecklare, arkitekter, data engineers och AI-specialister.


Det här är en möjlighet för dig som vill utvecklas i framkant inom generativ AI, arbeta i tekniknära team och omsätta nya idéer till robusta lösningar i produktion.

**Om rollen**


Som AI Engineer hos oss utvecklar du AI-drivna system och integrationslösningar i cloudmiljöer som Azure, AWS och GCP. Fokus ligger på backendutveckling, AI orchestration och integration av språkmodeller i skalbara system och plattformar.


Du kommer att arbeta i projekt där AI är en central del av lösningen och där tekniken används i produktion för att automatisera processer, förbättra beslutsstöd och skapa nya användarupplevelser.


Hos oss handlar AI inte om isolerade demos eller chatbotar, utan om robusta lösningar som integreras i verksamhetskritiska system och arbetsflöden.

**Du kommer att arbeta med**

* Integration av språkmodeller som GPT, Claude eller Mistral i backend och affärssystem
* AI orchestration och agentbaserade arbetsflöden
* RAG arkitektur och integration mot interna datakällor
* Semantic search och vektorsökning
* LangChain, Semantic Kernel eller liknande AI ramverk
* API utveckling och integration mellan AI tjänster och interna plattformar
* Backendutveckling i Python, TypeScript eller liknande språk
* AI lösningar i distribuerade system och cloudmiljöer
* Containerplattformar och Kubernetes
* Infrastruktur som kod och automatiserade deployments
* Utveckling av AI funktionalitet som används i produktion och skapar konkret affärsvärde

**Vi söker dig som:**  

Vi tror att du har några års erfarenhet av backendutveckling, cloud eller distribuerade system och att du under de senaste åren har arbetat praktiskt med AI-integrationer, LLM-lösningar eller agentbaserade system.

**Meriterande**  

Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av flera av följande områden:

* Python eller TypeScript
* Backendutveckling och API-design
* Azure, AWS eller GCP
* LangChain, Semantic Kernel eller liknande AI-ramverk
* LLM-integrationer och generativ AI
* RAG och semantic search
* Vektordatabaser som Pinecone, Weaviate eller Azure AI Search
* Distribuerade system och integrationslösningar
* Kubernetes och containerplattformar
* DevOps, CI/CD och cloud native-utveckling

**Personliga egenskaper**  

Du har en stark teknisk grund inom backendutveckling och systemdesign, kombinerat med ett genuint intresse för hur AI kan integreras i riktiga system och plattformar.


Som person är du kommunikativ, nyfiken och lösningsorienterad. Du trivs i konsultrollen, gillar att samarbeta nära både kund och team och kan växla mellan tekniskt djup och affärsförståelse. Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska.

**Därför Knowit Core Malmö**


Hos Knowit Core får du det bästa av två världar: närheten, entreprenörsandan och flexibiliteten i ett mindre bolag, tillsammans med styrkan, nätverket och möjligheterna i ett etablerat konsultbolag. I Malmö blir du en del av ett engagerat team av utvecklare, cloudspecialister, data engineers, arkitekter och AI-specialister som gärna delar kunskap, utmanar varandra och har roligt tillsammans.

**Vi erbjuder**

* Tekniskt avancerade och varierande uppdrag inom AI, cloud och backendutveckling
* Möjlighet att arbeta nära den senaste utvecklingen inom generativ AI, LLM-lösningar och intelligenta arbetsflöden
* Kompetensutveckling genom certifieringar, utbildningar och workshops
* Tid och budget för individuell utveckling och lärande
* Aktiv kunskapsdelning tillsammans med erfarna och engagerade kollegor
* En stark gemenskap med workshops, träningspass, kickoffer och sociala aktiviteter


Vill du vara med och bygga nästa generation AI-drivna system tillsammans med oss och samtidigt utvecklas i en miljö där teknik, innovation och affärsnytta möts?


Varmt välkommen med din ansökan till Knowit Core Malmö.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
På TechSeed bygger vi framtiden genom att kombinera affärsförståelse och digitalt ledarskap med nästa generations teknik. AI, XR, digitala tvillingar och IoT omformar nu företag och samhällen.


Som ett medarbetarägt bolag växer vi snabbt och smart inom våra tre strategiska domäner:

* **Smart Things** – intelligenta produkter och IoT-lösningar
* **Smart Industry** – digitala tvillingar och datadriven industri
* **Smart Society** – hållbara, AI-förstärkta offentliga system


Vi skapar lösningar där teknik och människa möts – från idé till verklig påverkan. Det här är vår drivkraft.

 **Som AI Engineer hos oss kommer du att arbeta i kunduppdrag där modern mjukvaruutveckling möter AI, data och intelligenta system. Rollen passar dig som är en stark utvecklare med intresse för AI och som vill vara med och omsätta ny teknik till lösningar som skapar verkligt värde för kunder.**


Vi bygger just nu upp vår satsning inom XR, digitala tvillingar, operativ intelligens och AI-drivna beslutsstöd. Området är en strategisk satsning för oss där vi utforskar hur AI, realtidsdata och immersiva teknologier kan samverka för att hjälpa organisationer att förstå, optimera och utveckla sina verksamheter på nya sätt.


Det innebär att du kommer att få möjlighet att vara med och forma både erbjudanden, lösningar och arbetssätt tillsammans med några av branschens mest erfarna utvecklare, arkitekter och innovationsledare.


Samtidigt är vi ett konsultbolag och huvuddelen av din tid kommer initialt att vara i kunduppdrag där du bidrar med din kompetens inom systemutveckling, AI och moderna mjukvaruplattformar.


Du kommer att arbeta nära utvecklare, arkitekter, domänexperter och kunder, både i leveransprojekt och i utvecklingen av framtida erbjudanden och lösningar.

###### **Din bakgrund och kompetens**

* Minst 7 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling och modern mjukvaruutveckling.
* Goda kunskaper i Python, C#, Java eller liknande programmeringsspråk.
* Erfarenhet av backend-utveckling, API och integrationer.
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP.
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och produktionssätta lösningar i verksamhetskritiska miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av containerteknik och moderna utvecklingsmiljöer.
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt i kundprojekt och omsätta teknik till affärsnytta.
* Flytande svenska och engelska.
* Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav på grund av våra kunders säkerhetskrav.

###### **Meriterande erfarenheter**

* AI-lösningar i produktion.
* LLM, AI-agenter, RAG eller semantiska söklösningar.
* Azure AI, OpenAI, Claude eller liknande plattformar.
* TensorFlow, PyTorch eller andra maskininlärningsramverk.
* Realtidsdata och eventdrivna system.
* Distribuerade system och mikrotjänstarkitekturer.
* IoT, digitala tvillingar eller operativ intelligens.
* XR, simulering eller visualisering.
* Kubernetes, DevOps eller MLOps.

###### **Om TechSeed**


TechSeed är ett medarbetarägt konsultbolag i snabb tillväxt, där vi bygger framtiden tillsammans. Hos oss får du både inflytande och ägarskap. Vi tror på nära samarbeten, nyfikenhet och modet att skapa lösningar som gör skillnad inom **Smart Things, Smart Industry och Smart Society**.


Vi erbjuder en kultur där människor och teknik får utrymme att utvecklas, där idéer tas tillvara och där en stark gemenskap gör det naturligt att växa tillsammans. Som en del av TechSeed får du:

* **Delägarskap** och möjlighet att vara med på resan mot framtida IPO
* **Bonus** kopplat till bolagets resultat
* **Stort inflytande** i hur vi formar vårt erbjudande
* **En öppen, inkluderande kultur** där vi utvecklas och lär av varandra
* **Möjligheten att växa** in i nya teknikområden och ansvarsroller
* **Flexibla arbetssätt** som fungerar med uppdrag och vardag
* **5 000 kr i friskvård**
* **Hälsoförsäkring**


Hos TechSeed får du möjlighet att leda och forma avancerade lösningar i en snabbväxande, innovativ miljö. Vi söker seniora tekniska talanger som vill vara med och skapa verklig förändring och långsiktig impact.

**Välkommen med din ansökan idag!**

title: Expert DevOps/SRE Engineer for a new strategic Data Platform
description:
**Job ID: 1102**
 Welcome to Group Technology, where we pride ourselves on engineering solutions and direct Nordea’s transformation by providing a holistic technological view and structured understanding of the bank, and its surrounding environment to enable the Customer Vision and the Business Strategy.
   

  

 We are looking for an Expert DevOps/SRE Engineer to help us deliver a new strategic data solution named Availability Layer which will play a key role for Nordea's new Data Reference Architecture.
   

  

 Nordea is a place where traditions meet tomorrow. We're not just a bank, we're a tech employer on a mission to evolve finance securely and responsibly. Together, we impact millions of people’s daily lives by ensuring they can access our solutions anytime, anywhere, while safeguarding their personal data and wealth. Join us in making an impact on the banking industry.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the Integration team. Our role is to provide, automate and support IT infrastructure based on modern IT toolset to power highly available and cost-efficient applications. As the Expert DevOps/SRE Engineer, you’ll play a valuable role in building the financial solutions of tomorrow.
   

  

**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Building modern infrastructure components, based on on-premise and cloud platforms, such as Kubernetes, Terraform Enterprise, AWS EKS
* Automating infrastructure deployment and configuration
* Acting as Site Reliability Engineer to support service issues, including future on call role
* Working closely with team members and other stakeholders across multiple countries
* Expanding your knowledge and horizons by having access to a large environment and learning from fellow technology-obsessed colleagues


**Who You Are**
 This is the right role for you if you are passionate about data management and DevOps methodologies. If you aspire to build a new data platform from scratch, this is the right job for you.
   

  

**Your background and skills include:**
* Experience with various DevOps solutions
* Knowledge of Kubernetes, AWS platforms
* Automating through solutions like Terraform, Jenkins, Ansible
* Understanding security implications in the context of a large financial institution
* Source control using Git
* Monitoring with Prometheus/Victoria Metrics/Grafana
* Python, Bash or any other scripting language
* Good English skills


**Nice to have, but not strictly required:**
* Prior experience with Kong API Gateway, Kafka, Apache Iceberg and Snowflake.


**What We Offer**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**People** 
 are driven by many different factors. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model** 
 - 40% remote – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 31/08/2026.
   

  

**The recruitment process consists of the following steps:**
* Preliminary CV selection
* Phone conversation with the recruiter
* Online interview with the hiring leader
* Background check


**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us. Studies show that members of underrepresented communities don’t apply for jobs unless they tick all the qualification boxes. If this is part of why you hesitate to apply, we would like you to reconsider and give it a chance. Maybe your profile fits our needs much better than you think.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Poland:** 
 Please include permit for processing personal data in CV as following:
   

  

 In accordance with art. 6 (1) a and b. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) hereinafter ‘GDPR’. I agree to have: my personal data, education and employment history proceeded for the purposes of current and future recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp.
   

  

 The administrator of your personal data is: Nordea Bank Abp operating in Poland through its Branch, address: Aleja Edwarda Rydza Śmiglego 20, 93-281 Łodź. Your personal data will be processed for the recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp. You have a right to access your personal data, right to rectify and right to delete. Disclosing the personal data in the scope specified by the provisions of Polish Labour Code from 26 June 1974 and executive acts are mandatory. Providing personal data is necessary to conduct the recruitment processes. The request for the deletion of your personal data means resignation from further participation in recruitment processes and causes the immediate removal of your application. Detailed information concerning processing of your personal data can be found at: https://www.nordea.com/en/doc/nordea-privacy-policy-for-applicants.pdf .

title: Erfaren PLC-programmerare (Egenkonsult / B2B) – Smålandsstenar
description:
Vi söker nu en PLC-programmerare med starkt fokus på utveckling till vår kund (en etablerad och stabil industrikoncern i Smålandsstenar som utvecklar automatiserade lagersystem och mekanisk hanterings utrustning.)
   

  

 Företaget har idag en intern PLC-funktion på plats som sköter den dagliga driften, men behöver nu utöka teamet för att bygga bort sårbarhet och accelerera sina utvecklingsprojekt. Rollerna kommer att delas upp tydligt: den interna programmeraren fokuserar på produktion och underhåll, medan ditt uppdrag blir en renodlad utvecklingsroll där du fokuserar på att vidareutveckla systemarkitekturen och industrialisera nya automationskoncept.
   

  

 Viktigt för detta uppdrag: Verksamheten är en fysisk tillverkande industri och teamet är i dagsläget inte rustat för distansarbete. Uppdraget kräver därför att du bor på pendlingsavstånd och kan arbeta helt på plats i Smålandsstenar.
   

  

 ⚙️ Dina arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Utveckling & Nykonstruktion: Ansvara för programmering och vidareutveckling av PLC-system för maskiner, transportband, skannersystem och integrerad lagerutrustning.
   

  

 Arkitektur & Systemdesign: Fungera som ett tekniskt bollplank vid val av framtida automationslösningar tillsammans med företagets tekniska ledning.
   

  

 Redundans: Dokumentera och strukturera kod för att säkra och tillgängliggöra företagets automationskapacitet framåt.
   

  

 Obs! Den dagliga felavhjälpningen och det löpande underhållet i fabriken hanteras primärt av den interna teknikern.
   

  

 👤 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är en trygg egenkonsult med gedigen erfarenhet av maskinnära programmering och industriell automation.
   

  

 Erfarenhet: Dokumenterad erfarenhet av PLC-programmering med fokus på utveckling och nykonstruktion (gärna inom tillverkande industri, logistiksystem eller transportsystem).
   

  

 Teknisk kompetens: Stabil grund inom PLC-programmering samt god förståelse för hur mjukvara och hårdvara (transporter, motorer, sensorer) samverkar.
   

  

 Mentalitet: Du är självgående, pragmatisk och trivs bäst när du får arbeta hands-on nära den fysiska utrustningen.
   

  

 Språk: Svenska eller engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

 🚀 Varför detta uppdrag via Teampilot?
   

  

 Här kliver du in som nyckelperson i ett mycket välskött bolag med korta beslutsvägar och starka, finansiella ägare i ryggen. Du får fokusera helt på nyutveckling i en miljö där dina insatser gör direkt skillnad för produktionen.
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid
   

  

 Uppdragstyp: B2B-kontrakt (Fakturering via eget bolag)
   

  

 Start: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Plats: 100% På plats i Smålandsstenar

title: Remote Sales Representative
description:
We are looking for motivated Remote Sales Representatives to sell our IT services, including Cloud, AI, Software Development, ERP, IoT, and Managed IT Services.

This is a commission-based role. Earnings are based on closed deals.

You will work remotely to identify potential B2B clients, build relationships, and manage the full sales cycle.

**Responsibilities**

* Identify and contact potential B2B clients across different industries
* Present and sell IT services to prospective clients
* Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified leads
* Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing
* Collaborate with technical teams to define client solutions
* Maintain CRM records of sales activities

**Requirements**

* Experience in B2B sales (IT services preferred)
* Strong communication and negotiation skills
* Fluent in English
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment
* Understanding of IT services is a plus

**Compensation**

* Commission-based compensation only
* 15% commission per closed deal
* Earnings depend on performance and completed projects
* No fixed salary

Job Type: Commission  
Contract length: 6 months

Pay: 1,00kr - 50 000,00kr per month

Work Location: Remote

title: Project Manager, Operations SP&C - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Malmö, Sweden


* Full-time
* Delivery, Project and Product Management
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with purposeful technology and product offerings that help them in their life. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**

 **About us**


Through advanced, intuitive technology, Tieto Caretech reduces administrative work, improves decision-making, and strengthens safety and quality in health and social care. With the Lifecare software portfolio we enable health and social care professionals to focus  

on what matters most: people.


We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can be part of advancing societies through purposeful technology and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people.  



**About the role**


In the Specialized care & Consulting - Operations we provide product deliveries and support for healthcare customers for example in laboratories. Our team consists of professionals in delivery, application and technical expertise and deliver products and services in wide Nordic collaboration.  

  

We are now looking for Project manager to our Swedish operations team to focus on our pathology products used in our customers laboratories. Your daily work consists of delivering projects. You'll work in close collaboration with customers, application specialists and product developers in Sweden.  



**In this role you will**

* Lead small, medium and large customer projects related to Tieto’s Laboratory solutions and ensure results according to the contracts, agreed scope, plans and financial targets.
* Day-to-day management of project deliveries including contract fulfilment, profitability, invoicing, quality and customer satisfaction
* Communicate the project objective and setting the expectations for the team members. Responsible for setting the direction for the team during project work
* Establish good project culture, motivate the project team and promote a good working environment and morale
* Report project status, progress and estimates with agreed frequency to the steering group
* Prepare basis for decisions including proposing project changes
* Ensure the project organization and working method are suitable, documented and clear. Identify and introduce improvements.

 **We are looking for someone with**

* Project management skills, demonstrated through experience working on cross-functional projects
* Communication skills and ability to inspire, and collaborate efficiently with key stakeholders
* Problem-solving and analytical skills
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both oral and written

 **It would be beneficial if you also**

* Have knowledge in the laboratory area

 **What’s in it for you?**


With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.

 **Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Olli Kiiski olli.kiiski@tieto.com.

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: At the heart of Tieto are our people – collaborators, creators, and problem-solvers who bring innovations to life. Join us !

title: Data Center Technician
description:
**Overview**  

As a Microsoft Data Center Technician (DCT), you will stage, set up and perform hardware deployments. In addition, you will also perform troubleshooting and diagnostics on equipment, as well as perform hardware decommissions for simple changes and refreshes following Standard Operating Procedures. This opportunity will allow you to deepen your understanding of Data Center standard processes and procedures, develop mentoring skills while providing guidance to peers, familiarizing yourself with security and data management procedures, and accelerate your career growth in the process.


Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) is the engine that powers our cloud services. As a CO+I DCT, you will perform a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft's online services including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and the Microsoft Azure platform. As a group, CO+I is focused on the personal and professional development of all employees and offers training and growth opportunities including Career Rotation Programs, Diversity & Inclusion training and events, and professional certifications.


Our infrastructure is comprised of a large global portfolio of more than 200 Data Centers in 32 countries and millions of servers. Our foundation is built upon and managed by a team of subject matter experts working to support services for more than 1 billion customers and 20 million businesses in over 90 countries worldwide.


With environmental sustainability and optimization at the forefront of our data center design and operations, we continue to grow and evolve as we meet the ever-changing business demands that hold Microsoft as a world-class cloud provider.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities*** Performs diagnostics and troubleshooting following standard procedures, quickly identifies the cause(s) of issues, and replaces faulty components with minimal customer and business disruption.
* Performs post-execution quality checks and verifies that grounding, staging, labeling, and cabling are set up properly according to safety protocols, deployment standards, and planned Network Design Tasks (NDTs).
* Decommissions hardware for simple changes and refreshes (e.g., memory upgrades, rebuilds) following standard procedures with minimal guidance.
* Follows procedures to communicate, report, and escalate incidents to appropriate Microsoft data center operations management units, Technician Leads, and engineering specialists.
* Assists and provides guidance to other technicians to complete challenging or complex tasks.
* Completes required training aligned to the role and workload; observes more experienced technicians to gain hands-on experience and relevant on-the-job training.
* Contributes to a positive and effective team environment by sharing information with others, contributing to regular team meetings, asking questions, and staying apprised of the status of others' work.
* Has pride and a sense of accountability for the service quality, completeness, and resulting user experience; displays accountability and ownership of the data center facilities.
* Embodies our culture and values.

 **Qualifications** **Required Qualifications****:**

* High school diploma, GED, or equivalent and basic knowledge of computer hardware and components AND experience supporting IT equipment or related technology.


While not required, we also look for the following***Preferred Qualifications:***

* Extensive experience supporting IT equipment or related technology.
* Applicable certifications: CompTIA (A+, Server+, Network+), Basic Structure Cabling (BSC).

**Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**
company_description: Our mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**Xensam: Join the Future of SAM**  

Xensam is the leader in AI-powered, cloud-based Software Asset Management. Our technology brings clarity to complex IT environments, helping users make smart, data-driven decisions and maximize software ROI.


Recognized with the Highest Growth Award and ranked #3 Overall Champion at the Main Software 50 Awards Nordics, we’re scaling fast and looking for people who want to join the journey. At Xensam, you play a key role in a team built on energy, focus, and positivity. We value experience, but even more, the person behind it.


Together, we build the future of SAM.

 **About the role**


We are seeking a Engineering Manager to lead and scale engineering execution and people leadership across multiple development teams in our R&D organization. The role is central to building a predictable, scalable, and sustainable engineering organization as the company continues to grow.


As Engineering Manager, you will focus on establishing consistent and scalable ways of working, developing teams, and ensuring reliable delivery while maintaining quality, stability, and clear ownership. You will work closely with Product, QA, Security, Infrastructure, and other engineering leaders to ensure alignment, resolve dependencies, and continuously improve how engineering delivers value. The role includes people leadership of around 10-15 engineers and the role reports directly to the VP of Engineering.

**Responsibilities**

* Lead, mentor, and develop multiple development teams, establishing clear roles, ownership, balanced team capacity, and scalable ways of working.
* Support efficient and predictable delivery across teams by resolving blockers, managing dependencies, and supporting priority decisions in close collaboration with product leadership.
* Evolve and standardize engineering practices and tooling to maximize efficiency, stability, and consistency across teams.
* Implement and continuously evolve AI-supported engineering workflows and methodologies that are safe and efficient.
* Collaborate closely with QA and Security leadership to integrate sustainable quality assurance processes and secure development practices into everyday engineering work.
* Drive technical improvement initiatives, including technical debt and component lifecycle management, by clearly articulating trade-offs, risks, and alternative costs in collaboration with product leadership.
* Participate in hiring, onboarding, development and performance management.
* Manage the full lifecycle of consultant engagements, ensuring effective integration with internal teams and alignment with delivery goals.
* Establish and use execution metrics to create transparency, support decision-making, and drive continuous improvement.

**Qualifications**


* Proven experience in a engineering leadership role with responsibility for multiple teams.
* Strong people leadership skills with a focus on coaching, development, and building scalable organizations.
* Experience establishing consistent and scalable execution models.
* Solid technical background with the ability to engage in architectural and lifecycle discussions without requiring hands-on coding.
* Experience working cross-functionally with Product, QA, Security, and Infrastructure teams.
* Ability to manage complexity and scale in a fast-paced, growing organization.
* Experience using execution metrics to support continuous improvement.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field, or equivalent professional experience.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in fluent English (Swedish is a plus).

**What you get**

* A generous work culture with free drinks and snacks, office massages, and more.
* Three days in-office (with remote work on Mondays and Fridays).
* An opportunity to shape your career growth while contributing to the company’s success.
* A dynamic position embracing "freedom under responsibility".
* If sales targets are met, all employees enjoy an annual destination trip.
* Other location-specific benefits.

**Our values at Xensam**

**Rebellious**  

We challenge the norm and act with initiative – always with responsibility.

**Humane**  

We foster a caring, inclusive environment that values diversity and respects individuality.

**Harmony**  

We value balance and create a supportive workplace where people thrive.


As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks on final candidates to fulfill our commitments to customers and ensure a safe work environment.

title: Senior AI & Automation Lead - M3
description:
### **About the role**


Columbus M3 is looking to strengthen its capability within AI and automation. We are already highly experienced in Infor M3, ERP-driven business transformation and industry-specific processes. We now want to accelerate how we use AI and automation both in the solutions we deliver to customers and in the way we work ourselves.


This role is not about adding AI as a separate technology layer. It is about helping the M3 business line identify, shape and scale practical AI and automation opportunities that create measurable business value — for our customers and for our own teams.


As Senior AI & Automation Lead for M3, you will work at the intersection of ERP, business processes, AI, automation, data and change. You will help translate opportunities into concrete use cases, reusable methods, sales assets, delivery accelerators and new ways of working.


This role focuses on identifying and turning AI and automation opportunities within M3 into practical, value-driven solutions. It supports both sales and delivery by shaping AI positioning, contributing to proposals, and building reusable methods and assets. The role also strengthens internal ways of working by applying AI across projects and processes, acts as a link between M3 experts and broader AI capabilities, and helps teams focus on realistic, scalable opportunities while building overall competence through training and guidance.

### **What we hope you bring**

* Documented experience in designing and delivering **LLM-based AI solutions in enterprise environments**, from early-stage design to production.
* Experience with **modern AI architecture patterns**, such as RAG solutions and agent-based setups, including context engineering, prompt design, orchestration, and quality assurance.
* Strong experience in **integrating AI solutions** via APIs, connectors, skills, MCP, or similar patterns with business systems and organizational data.
* Solid understanding of **security, identity, access control, governance, and responsible AI**, and how to apply these in practical solution design within cloud environments
* *Knowledge within Infor M3 is not a requirement - but very meritious!*  

  

This position is based in Sweden and requires a Swedish working VISA and residency.

#### **Application**


At our company, you can easily apply using your LinkedIn profile or your CV, without having to fill out long questionnaires. You do not need to submit a cover letter.


In our recruitment process, we use logic and personality tests. We always check references and conduct a background check before an employment offer is made. If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact the responsible recruiter Daniel Sparrow. Interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis.


After the recruitment process has ended, we will ask you about your experience as a candidate. It only takes a few seconds to answer, and it helps us improve our recruitment process.

### **About Columbus M3**

**Who are we?** As a partner to Infor, we are a team of skilled M3 consultants who deliver M3 to our customers. We work with large, global and exciting customers! Here you can read more about our customer projects.

**Why?** We want to help our customers achieve their business goals and make their everyday life more efficient! The aim is to ensure their long-term success and guide customers by being their *Trusted Advisor.* Therefore, we also offer maintenance, support and further development of their solutions. We collaborate with customers to optimize their systems, improve performance and prevent incidents.


### **Working at Columbus**


People always come first at Columbus. We are a global consulting firm with local presence, helping companies with their digital transformation and to thrive through technology, data, and human insight. We are also a workplace where you, as an employee, can develop your career and get support through clear and structured career paths.
  

  

Our culture is built on trust, collaboration, curiosity, and a shared commitment to deliver value to our clients. Whether you’re experienced or just starting out in your career, you’ll find the freedom to explore ideas, challenge the familiar, and shape your own path with us.
  

  

With more than 1,500 colleagues in over 10 countries, we combine global perspectives with local understanding. What unites us is our belief in creating meaningful impact – for our employees, our clients, and the journey ahead.


Let’s thrive, grow, and shape the future together!


### **What others say about us**


Interested in Columbus behind the scenes? Each week, we let a colleague take over our Instagram account.


At Careereye, current and former employees can share their **unfiltered reviews about what it’s like to work with us**. Click below to read their experiences.
company_description: We are the #1 one partner in the Nordics when it comes to digital transformation. We help our customers with solutions according to industry-specific needs to reach their full potential.

title: Monitoring & Observability Engineer
description:
**Vill du vara med och bygga observabilityförmågan bakom Sveriges betalflöden? Hos oss arbetar du med system som måste fungera – varje dag, i alla lägen.**
 På Bankgirot har vi gjort ett aktivt val: att ta ansvar för något större än oss själva. Sedan 1959 har vi säkerställt att Sveriges betalningar fungerar tryggt och stabilt. Nu befinner vi oss i en omfattande teknisk utvecklingsresa där vi moderniserar vår infrastruktur samtidigt som vi förvaltar det som redan fungerar.
   

  

**Hos oss får du:**
* Vara med och utveckla observabilityförmågan i samhällsviktiga system
* Arbeta med moderna verktyg som Grafana och andra observabilityplattformar
* Påverka teknikval, arbetssätt och plattformens fortsatta utveckling
* Arbeta nära flera tekniska team i en miljö där samarbete är avgörande


 Om rollen
   

  

 Som Monitoring & Observability Engineer blir du en del av teamet som vidareutvecklar vår centraliserade observabilityplattform. Grunden finns redan på plats, men arbetet framåt handlar om att utveckla datainsamling och skapa en mer proaktiv och skalbar observabilityförmåga för hela organisationen.
   

  

 Du arbetar både hands-on med tekniska lösningar och långsiktigt med att forma plattformens riktning i nära samarbete med utveckling, drift, infrastruktur och säkerhet.
   

  

 I rollen ingår att:
   

  

  

* Bygga och vidareutveckla lösningar för metrics, logs och traces
* Utveckla observabilityplattformen i Grafana och liknande verktyg
* Skapa dashboards, larm och notifieringsflöden
* Automatisera återkommande processer inom drift och monitorering
* Arbeta med felsökning, prestandaoptimering och incidenthantering


 Vi vill att du
   

  

 Vi söker dig som trivs i en miljö i förändring och vill vara med och påverka. Du har en bred teknisk grund och ett tydligt intresse för observability, monitoring eller automation.
   

  

  

* Har erfarenhet av observability- eller monitoreringsverktyg som Grafana, Splunk eller Prometheus
* Har förståelse för hur metrics, logs och traces används i komplexa system
* Har erfarenhet av infrastruktur, drift eller plattformsnära arbete
* Har arbetat med Linux-, Windows- eller containerbaserade miljöer
* Är analytisk, lösningsorienterad och trivs i samarbete med andra


**Så arbetar vi tillsammans**
 Hos oss arbetar vi gärna tillsammans på kontoret – det stärker samarbete, lärande och vår gemensamma kultur. Här finns goda möjligheter att utvecklas i yrkesrollen och ta nästa steg över tid. Vi erbjuder också förmåner som gör skillnad i vardagen, som eget gym, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, cykelförmån samt trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning**
 För rollen genomförs säkerhetsprövning innan anställning i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) – en naturlig del av ansvaret att värna tryggheten i Sveriges betalsystem.
   

  

**Anställningsform**
 Tillsvidare
   

  

**Tillträde**
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Vill du vara med och skapa framdrift? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig. Urval sker löpande.
   

  

 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar vi med Nexer Recruit. Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta gärna rekryteringskonsult Johanna Värmfors: johanna.varmfors@nexergroup.com eller +46 730 821 230 alternativt Jenny Nilsson: jenny.nilsson@nexergroup.com eller +46 703 018 279.
   

  

**Om Bankgirot**
 Sedan starten 1959 har Bankgirot stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker i det nationella betalsystemet. Företagets historia präglas av innovation, engagemang och stolthet över sitt samhällsviktiga uppdrag. Genom expertkunskap och en stark kultur arbetar man varje dag för att säkerställa att varje transaktion sker sömlöst och effektivt.
   

  

 Tillsammans med kunder och samarbetspartners skapas långsiktigt värde för marknaden och samhället. Som en förenande kraft formar Bankgirot en modern och framtidssäkrad svensk betalinfrastruktur. Bankgirot förenar, förvaltar och förnyar betalsverige. Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: Field Service Engineer - Denmark
description:
**Work Schedule**


Other**Environmental Conditions**


Able to lift 40 lbs. without assistance, Adherence to all Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) Safety Standards, Office, Some degree of PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) required (safety glasses, gowning, gloves, lab coat, ear plugs etc.)**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you'll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer.  

  

**DESCRIPTION:**


We are seeking an experienced Field Service Engineer to join our BioProduction Service and Support team at Thermo Fisher Scientific. In this crucial role, you'll contribute by ensuring our sophisticated scientific instruments operate at peak performance, with a focus on Single Use Technology (SUT) hardware and automation products. You'll represent our company, delivering exceptional technical service while building strong relationships with customers who are advancing critical research and innovation in the bioproduction sector.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:**

* Travel to customer sites across North of Europe (primarily Denmark, Netherlands and Germany) as well as rest of Europe to install, service, update, and repair Thermo Fisher SUT hardware and automation products
* Provide expert technical support and problem-solving for our cutting-edge bioproduction equipment
* Conduct installations, maintenance, and repairs on a diverse range of high-value analytical instruments
* Perform commissioning and qualification of equipment by implementing Site Acceptance Test (SAT) and Installation/Operational Qualification (IQ/OQ) Protocols
* Combine technical expertise with superior customer service skills to address complex issues and support our customers in achieving breakthrough discoveries
* Collaborate with internal partners to resolve customer issues and improve processes
* Provide basic product training and technical assistance on our instrumentation to our customers and internal Sales team
* Report all activities on Sales Force Service desk, providing customer feedback to management, hardware and software groups
* Aid in optimizing revenue and new product development opportunities; Assist in demonstration of our products to potential customers
* Maintain technical competency by attending trainings, employee meetings and remaining up to speed on new products, markets, customers and competitor


This is a field-based position that will initially focus on supporting customers across France. As you grow in your role, you'll have the opportunity to support the full EMEA region. The position requires frequent travel on a weekly basis (50-100% of work time) to sites across EMEA. When not travelling, you'll have the flexibility to work from home.

**REQUIREMENTS:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Engineering (Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Biomedical or a related scientific field) or equivalent Advanced Degree plus 3 years of experience
* Proven experience installing, troubleshooting, and repairing sophisticated analytical instruments, particularly in the bioproduction sector
* Strong electronics and mechanical aptitude with the ability to diagnose issues down to the component level
* Excellent customer service skills and professional demeanor
* Strong verbal and written communication abilities
* Fluency in English required, Danish highly desirable.
* Demonstrated problem-solving capabilities and analytical thinking
* Proficiency with Windows operating systems, MS Office, and service management software
* Ability to read and interpret technical diagrams, schematics, and documentation
* Valid driver's license and ability to travel 50-100% of the time (away from home Monday through Friday is typically expected)
* Physical ability to lift up to 25 kg and stand for extended periods
* Experience with bioproduction equipment, particularly Single Use Technology (SUT) hardware and automation products
* Availability to work flexible hours and respond to emergency service calls
* Must be able to obtain necessary credentials to access customer facilities
* Strong organizational skills and ability to manage time effectively
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work independently in the field
* Willingness to support the full EMEA region as the role develops
* Self-sufficient; comfortable working independently; logical approach in setting work priorities


At Thermo Fisher Scientific, we provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world's toughest challenges in bioproduction and beyond.
company_description: At Thermo Fisher Scientific, our professionals develop critical solutions—and build rewarding careers.
